data.raceComments: {"comment":"9. NICCY'S AFFAIR is flying this prep and now hunts a third straight win after proving too sharp again over 1000m last start. The extra distance is the only slight query, but she handled this track and trip first-up and should land in a sweet spot from the draw. Hard to beat again. 2. CRUISE TO RIO was terrific last time, slicing through from the back, and that form has since been franked. She draws to settle much closer this time, and her record at the track and distance is rock-solid. She is good enough to take this out. 10. BRAVE APACHE rediscovered his spark last run, sticking on well for second after rolling forward at big odds and only going down late. He has a superior gate this time, and with less weight to carry, he is a top 4 chance again. 11. TOP OF THE POPS looks ready to lift now that he gets out to a more suitable trip, and he is worth including in all top 4 combos.","runners":[9,2,10,11],"exclusive":true}
